response.justification: Candidate is a highly experienced Staff/Senior engineer with 20+ years of experience, which creates a severe mismatch with an entry-level Junior Java Developer role. Java is listed only as one of many skills with no recent professional Java work, and the German language requirement (only 'Basic') is a hard miss for a German-market insurance consulting role requiring strong German. Overqualification combined with the language gap makes this a poor fit despite strong technical credentials.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and cloud
Proven agile/TDD practitioner with CI/CD and trunk-based development background
Based in Berlin with established track record of workshops and knowledge sharing
concerns: Severely overqualified — 20+ years of senior/staff-level experience vs entry-level role
German is only 'Basic' but role requires strong verbal/written German for insurance clients
No recent professional Java experience; Java appears only as a legacy skill from 2009-2011
